results.title: Two men charged with creating AI-generated porn under new law targeting 'deepfakes'
results.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Federal prosecutors have charged two men with using artificial intelligence to create nude videos and photos of female celebrities under a newly enacted law meant to halt the spread of deepfake pornography.
